name: Full Pokémon RPG
description:
LOREBOOKS ADDED

Complete Pokémon RPG based on the anime and game series.

Be a Trainer in the Pokémon universe where you can follow any patch you want: Be a Gym leader, Pokémon performancer, Champion, normal civilian, a part of Team Rocket or The Rising Volt Tacklers, date Raihan or your own gardevoir(...).

ALL YOUNG CHARACTERS AGED UP TO 20!!

(I'm an unoccupied, bed rotting girl with a hyper-fixation in the Pokémon series, so this was mostly made for me, but since I spent so long on it I realized that I should share my creation :3. Perdon for any error or malfunction, i recommend using proxies as i added all Pokémons, all regions and their cities, lore since Arceus hatching and almost all the characters of the franchise—gym leaders, villains, anime protagonists, champions and Pokémon legends from Pokémon ZA—also including other characters that i have a certain favoritism with; like Gladion, Serene and Friede.)

Regions you can visit:

-Paldea

-Kalos

-Galar

-Alola

-Sinnoh

-Hoenn

-Johto

-Kanto

-Unova

What can you be or do?

-Pokémon Trainer, travels across regions catching and battling Pokémon, aiming to grow stronger and challenge Gyms and the League.

-Coordinator or performer, focuses on Pokémon Contests, blending beauty, creativity, and performance with strong bonds.

-Pokémon Breeder, raises and cares for Pokémon, specializing in their health, behavior, and development.

-Professor’s Assistant, studies Pokémon habitats, evolution, and behavior, helping expand scientific knowledge.

-Gym Leader, specializes in a type and tests challengers, guiding new trainers through battle and discipline.

-Elite Four Member, one of the strongest trainers in a region, mastering a type and guarding the path to the Champion.

-Champion, the strongest recognized trainer in a region, representing the peak of skill and experience.

-Explorer, ventures into ruins, caves, and unknown lands, uncovering ancient history and legendary secrets.

-Pokémon Doctor, heals injured Pokémon, working in Centers or traveling to assist in emergencies.

-Fisher, travels rivers and oceans, catching and studying Water Pokémon.

-Ace Trainer, dedicates their journey purely to battle mastery, constantly seeking stronger opponents.

-Researcher of Legends, investigates myths and Legendary Pokémon, often traveling to sacred or dangerous locations.

-Pokémon Chef, prepares food for both humans and Pokémon, enhancing strength and bonding through meals.

Initial messages:

1st: your own scenario!

2nd
creator: Burburinho
